'''Kutuab''' controlled his own small empire around [[Meirm City]] on [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]], answering ultimately to [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]. His base of operations was a bunker several hundred kilometers from the city, in the middle of the desert. Kutuab sold arms to both [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] and [[Houk/Legends|Houk]] gangs in the city, and fueled the existing tensions between the two species to drum up more business. [[Limna Yith]] offered to sell Kutuab information on [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] 's operations along the [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]], but Kutuab refused to pay the price in order to avoid trouble with [[Sprax]], whom he feared. Yith escaped from Kutuab's [[sail yacht]] to her own [[Skiff/Legends|cargo skiff]] and fled across the wastes of Sriluur. Kutuab threatened to toss Yith into [[Temptation Canyon]] to be eaten by [[bandigo]]s. He offered a reward of 10,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard|credits]] for her head, and 20,000 for her [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]].
